positive: A symmetrical, stylized graphic depiction of a lunar eclipse over a misty forest silhouette. The main composition features elegant, intertwining crescent moons and celestial orbits framing a centrally placed, detailed depiction of a single, glowing planet. The style is neo-art nouveau combined with minimalist cosmic graphics, using high contrast black and deep indigo silhouettes against vibrant, glowing nebula accents of ethereal turquoise and soft gold. Compositionally, the elements should suggest radial symmetry and balance, perfect for apparel print repeatability. Ensure clean lines, strong graphic impact, and a sense of mystical wonder. Vector art quality, crisp lines, centralized focus, flat graphic design.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, noise, amateur, dirty, artifacts, excessive detail, writing, extra limbs, bad anatomy, sloppy, cartoonish
